item.title: A Veteran on the Fear of War
item.description: A veteran shares a candid account of the fear and challenges experienced in combat, providing an honest perspective on the realities of war.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran on the Fear of War
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares a candid account of the fear and challenges experienced in combat, providing an honest perspective on the realities of war.

item.title: Hal Moore’s Orders About the Fallen
item.description: A veteran recounts instructions from Hal Moore on handling fallen soldiers, sharing the respect, discipline, and realities of military duty in combat.

media:content.media:title: Hal Moore’s Orders About the Fallen
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts instructions from Hal Moore on handling fallen soldiers, sharing the respect, discipline, and realities of military duty in combat.

item.title: Corpsman Earns 3 Purple Hearts in Vietnam
item.description: A Navy corpsman recounts saving Marines in Vietnam, earning three Purple Hearts for bravery and selflessness during intense combat situations.

media:content.media:title: Corpsman Earns 3 Purple Hearts in Vietnam
media:content.media:description: A Navy corpsman recounts saving Marines in Vietnam, earning three Purple Hearts for bravery and selflessness during intense combat situations.

item.title: Vietnam Vet Harvey Barnum Jr.’s Heroism
item.description: Harvey Barnum Jr. led Marines under heavy fire in Vietnam, saving lives and inspiring his unit, earning a Medal of Honor for bravery and leadership in combat.

media:content.media:title: Vietnam Vet Harvey Barnum Jr.’s Heroism
media:content.media:description: Harvey Barnum Jr. led Marines under heavy fire in Vietnam, saving lives and inspiring his unit, earning a Medal of Honor for bravery and leadership in combat.

item.title: A Veteran’s Journey from the Start
item.description: A veteran shares their full experience from the beginning of service, detailing training, challenges, and the realities of military life.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Journey from the Start
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares their full experience from the beginning of service, detailing training, challenges, and the realities of military life.

item.title: WWII Veteran Recalls Medal of Honor Moment
item.description: WWII veteran Rocco Telese shares witnessing a Medal of Honor act while fighting in Italy, highlighting bravery and heroism on the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Recalls Medal of Honor Moment
media:content.media:description: WWII veteran Rocco Telese shares witnessing a Medal of Honor act while fighting in Italy, highlighting bravery and heroism on the battlefield.

item.title: Pilot Shot Mid-Air Barely Survives
item.description: A pilot faces a life-threatening situation after being shot mid-air, recounting the harrowing experience and incredible survival story.

media:content.media:title: Pilot Shot Mid-Air Barely Survives
media:content.media:description: A pilot faces a life-threatening situation after being shot mid-air, recounting the harrowing experience and incredible survival story.

item.title: The First Time I Held My BAR
item.description: A personal moment as I handle my BAR for the first time, sharing initial impressions, history, and the experience of holding this iconic firearm.

media:content.media:title: The First Time I Held My BAR
media:content.media:description: A personal moment as I handle my BAR for the first time, sharing initial impressions, history, and the experience of holding this iconic firearm.

item.title: Landing in the First Wave on Omaha Beach
item.description: Experience the intense and historic first wave landing on Omaha Beach during D-Day, highlighting bravery, chaos, and the challenges faced by Allied forces.

media:content.media:title: Landing in the First Wave on Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: Experience the intense and historic first wave landing on Omaha Beach during D-Day, highlighting bravery, chaos, and the challenges faced by Allied forces.

item.title: Watching a 2000-Pound Bomb Explode
item.description: Experience the sheer power and spectacle of a 2000-pound bomb detonation, capturing the massive explosion and its incredible impact.

media:content.media:title: Watching a 2000-Pound Bomb Explode
media:content.media:description: Experience the sheer power and spectacle of a 2000-pound bomb detonation, capturing the massive explosion and its incredible impact.

item.title: The Dark Side of War No One Talks About
item.description: Exploring the untold hardships and human cost of war, shedding light on the struggles, trauma, and stories often overlooked in history.

media:content.media:title: The Dark Side of War No One Talks About
media:content.media:description: Exploring the untold hardships and human cost of war, shedding light on the struggles, trauma, and stories often overlooked in history.
